svg.text: NCA-JEPA Pipeline for Data-Scarce Neural Decoding
Unlimited synthetic data · Learn spatiotemporal primitives
Each sequence has a LATENT rule.
Model must infer it from context.
All patients pooled · No labels · Self-supervised
Encoder adapts from synthetic → real cortical dynamics.
Learns what's universal across patients (no labels needed).
Each patient independently · WITH labels · 5-fold CV
Pool latent vectors within each phoneme's time window
grid patterns. Head just learns mapping:
NCA sequences have latent rules. Neural trials have latent phonemes.
Both require inferring an unseen cause from spatiotemporal dynamics on a 2D grid.
NCA pre-pretraining teaches this skill on unlimited synthetic data. JEPA provides the stable training recipe.
